authorization_phrase: Authorize s18-d1 broad-universe weekly relative-strength rotation Tier-N spec DRAFT only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.

binding_caveats.edge_not_inherited: The s17 monthly economics (+$1,130.75/trade, win 63.5%, PF 2.42) were measured at MONTHLY cadence and are NOT inherited. Weekly re-ranking is noisier and weekly is the weakest first-principles edge basis in the ladder; the weekly edge MUST be RE-PROVEN at P6 IS (K1 sharpe_proxy>0 AND K2 expectancy>0).
binding_caveats.stop_before_SEAL_rule: Stop before SEAL if (a) a fuller pre-SEAL K9 check contradicts this measurement and OOS K9 < 50/y, OR (b) [at the next phases] P6 IS shows the weekly edge negative/zero, OR (c) K13 (P6.7) shows <3/5 folds positive. A K9 shortfall or edge failure is terminal, NOT rescued by cadence/M tuning (a further change is a fresh candidate). Here the K9 pre-SEAL gate PASSES; the EDGE is the remaining open gate.
